questions.hindi: मैंने उसे यह काम करने पर मजबूर किया।
questions.english: I made him do this work.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Make + object + base verb (force) | Get + object + to + base verb (persuade) | Get + object + V3 (causative)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I made him do this work."
questions.category: Make / Get (Causative and Common Usage) practice

questions.hindi: मैंने उसे यह काम करने के लिए मनाया।
questions.english: I got him to do this work.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Make + object + base verb (force) | Get + object + to + base verb (persuade) | Get + object + V3 (causative)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I got him to do this work."
questions.category: Make / Get (Causative and Common Usage) practice

questions.hindi: मैं अपनी कार ठीक करवाता हूँ।

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I get my car repaired."

questions.hindi: वह अच्छा खाना बनाती है।

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She makes good food."

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I got this job."

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He made me laugh."

questions.hindi: मैंने उसे मानने के लिए राज़ी किया।

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I got him to agree."

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She gets her hair cut."

questions.hindi: टीचर ने हमें चुप रहने को कहा (मजबूर किया)।
questions.english: The teacher made us stay quiet.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Make + object + base verb (force) | Get + object + to + base verb (persuade) | Get + object + V3 (causative)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "The teacher made us stay quiet."
questions.category: Make / Get (Causative and Common Usage) practice

questions.hindi: मैं अपना homework पूरा करवाता हूँ।

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I got that place."

questions.hindi: बॉस ने हमें late तक काम करने पर मजबूर किया।
